fields.name: Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the entry.

fields.name: Cost Adjustment Run Guid
fields.tooltip: Specifies the unique identifier of the cost adjustment run.

fields.name: Status
fields.tooltip: Specifies the status of the cost adjustment run.

fields.name: Starting Date-Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies the starting date and time of the cost adjustment run.

fields.name: Ending Date-Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies the duration of the cost adjustment run.

fields.name: Item Register No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the item register number that is created for the cost adjustment run. Blank value indicates that the cost adjustment has not produced any new value entries.

fields.name: Item Filter
fields.tooltip: Specifies the item filter used for the cost adjustment run.

fields.name: Last Error
fields.tooltip: Specifies the last error that occurred during the cost adjustment run.

fields.name: Last Error Call Stack
fields.tooltip: Specifies the last error call stack that occurred during the cost adjustment run.

fields.name: Failed Item No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the item number that failed during the cost adjustment run.
